ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the game */,
  "state_of_game" TEXT /* State of the game (e.g., PRE, POST) */,
  "game_url" TEXT /* URL for the game data */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "super_bowl_winner" TEXT /* Winner of the Super Bowl */,
  "super_bowl_runner_up" TEXT /* Runner-up of the Super Bowl */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., passing yards, rushing touchdowns) */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_category" TEXT /* Category of the statistic (e.g., passing, rushing, receiving) */,
  "stat_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., passing yards, rushing touchdowns) */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "coaching_experience" TEXT /* Coaching experience of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., concussion, knee sprain) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
column_names: State of the game (e.g., PRE, POST)
Type of statistic (e.g., passing yards, rushing touchdowns)
Category of the statistic (e.g., passing, rushing, receiving)
Type of statistic (e.g., passing yards, rushing touchdowns)
Type of injury (e.g., concussion, knee sprain)
